trips.title: Trip Management
trips.shareMessage: Hello {{clientName}}, here are the details for your trip to {{destination}} on {{date}}. Total price: {{price}}.

trips.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this trip?
trips.ticketDetailsHelper: Add the flight details for this booking.
trips.tryAdjustingFilters: Try clearing or adjusting the current filters.
trips.limitNotice: Showing the first 50 trips for faster browsing. Use search or filters to narrow the list.

trips.statusFilterHelper: Use this filter to focus on ongoing, completed, cancelled, or archived trips.
trips.editTripSubtitle: Review the trip details before saving your changes.

trips.descriptionHelper: Use notes for reminders, inclusions, or anything the team should not miss.
trips.mainTripCurrencyHelper: Base currency for reporting and dashboard.

trips.discardChangesDescription: You have unsaved trip changes. If you close now, they will be lost.
trips.discardDraftDescription: You have an unsaved trip draft. If you close now, this draft will be removed.

validation.endDateAfterStart: End date must be after start date

validation.mixedPaymentTotal: Card and cash amounts must equal the paid amount.

statusDescriptions.active: The trip is ongoing, upcoming, or still being managed.
statusDescriptions.completed: The trip finished successfully and remains in your normal records.
statusDescriptions.cancelled: The trip will stay in records, but it should not count as an active booking.
statusDescriptions.archived: The trip is hidden from the main list, but still kept for reference.

paymentStatusDescriptions.paid: The full amount has been received.
paymentStatusDescriptions.partial: Part of the payment was received, but there is still a remaining balance.
paymentStatusDescriptions.unpaid: No payment has been received yet.

heroTitle: Comprehensive Accounting & Management System for All Businesses - MyDesck PRO
heroSubtitle: Smart software for sales, customers, and tax invoices. Designed for all business types: shops, service providers, and travel agencies.

sales.title: Sales & Client Management
sales.desc: Streamline your sales process, track client debts effortlessly, and manage digital contracts in a single unified platform.

invoices.title: Instant Tax Invoices
invoices.desc: Generate professional tax invoices, receipts, and price quotes instantly. Fully compliant and ready for your accountant.

reports.title: Profit & Growth Reports
reports.desc: Visualize your performance with comprehensive profit, revenue, and growth analytics dashboards.

features.title: Everything you need to run your business

demo.title: See it in action
demo.description: Our interface is designed for speed and simplicity. Optimized for performance and ease of use.

list.darkMode: Dark Mode support for night shifts

demo.placeholder: Interactive Demo / App Walkthrough Video Here

market.title: Supermarket & Retail
market.description: The ultimate solution for retail management. Lightning-fast POS, smart inventory, and detailed profit analytics.

features.scanDesc: Fast barcode scanning with support for manual entry and weight scales.
features.inventoryDesc: Manage your stock levels, categories, and pricing in one central place.
features.profitDesc: Track your margins in real-time. See exactly how much profit you make on ஒவ்வொரு item.
features.receiptsDesc: Support for thermal printers and customizable digital receipts.
features.adminDesc: One place to manage staff permissions and business reports.

trip.title: Tourism & Financials
trip.description: Complete trip and financial management. Handle quotes, client details, and invoicing in one unified platform.

features.tripsDesc: Track all your trips, dates, and client information in a clean, organized view.
features.financialsDesc: Detailed monitoring of costs, sales, and profits for every single operation.
features.quoteDesc: Create professional PDF quotes and invoices for clients in one click.
features.clientsDesc: Manage your client database with quick search and history tracking.

food.title: Restaurants & Cafes
food.description: Streamline your dining operations with table management, kitchen display systems, and digital menus.

features.tablesDesc: Design your floor plan with drag-and-drop tables. See occupancy status in real-time.
features.kitchenDesc: Send orders directly to the kitchen. Color-coded tickets show waiting times.
features.menuDesc: Easily update menu items, prices, and categories with modifiers like business lunch deals.
features.zreportDesc: Professional end-of-day reports to keep your accounts accurate and manageable.

other.title: Custom Solutions
other.description: Tailored solutions for Salons, Repair Shops, and other service-based businesses.
